title: 70% of Americans don’t want data centers built nearby, but the government is seizing private property to force construction to start
summary: Eminent domain has typically been reserved for critical infrastructure projects including power and transport, alongside government projects and public utilities. However, if the landowners say no, the power companies can call on the government to use its power of eminent domain.
caption: output/2026-07-20/70-of-americans-don-t-want-data-centers-built-nearby-but-the-governmen.txt
